---
# =============================================================================
# blog/index.qmd — Blog listing page
# =============================================================================
#
# HOW TO EDIT THIS PAGE
# ---------------------
# • The listing below automatically discovers every .qmd file inside
#   blog/posts/ and renders them as cards on this page.
# • To add a new post, create a new folder under blog/posts/ containing an
#   index.qmd with the standard front matter (see the welcome post for an
#   example).
# • Adjust `type` to change the listing layout:
#     grid   → responsive card grid (default)
#     table  → tabular list with date, title, description
#     default → simple title list
# • Set `categories: true` to show category filter buttons above the list.
# • `sort: "date desc"` keeps the newest post at the top.
#
# =============================================================================
title: "Blog"
description: "Tutorials, write-ups, and data science insights from Jules G Org."
listing:
  contents: posts          # scan the posts/ sub-directory
  sort: "date desc"
  type: grid
  categories: true
  fields: [image, title, date, description, categories, reading-time]
page-layout: full
title-block-banner: true   # show the title on a coloured banner
---
